items.name: asciify-react
items.title: Asciify (React)
items.description: Redraws your page as live ascii characters in a soft radius around the cursor, with real glyph, shade block, and binary ramps. The HTML stays interactive. No dependencies.

items.name: asciify-vue
items.title: Asciify (Vue)
items.description: Redraws your page as live ascii characters in a soft radius around the cursor, with real glyph, shade block, and binary ramps. The HTML stays interactive. No dependencies.

items.title: Asciify (Svelte)
items.description: Redraws your page as live ascii characters in a soft radius around the cursor, with real glyph, shade block, and binary ramps. The HTML stays interactive. No dependencies.

items.name: asciify-vanilla
items.title: Asciify (Vanilla)
items.description: Redraws your page as live ascii characters in a soft radius around the cursor, with real glyph, shade block, and binary ramps. The HTML stays interactive. No dependencies.

items.name: bubble-react
items.title: Bubble (React)
items.description: A glassy droplet that trails the cursor as blending metaballs and refracts the live page beneath it, with dispersion, frost, and an iridescent sheen. The HTML stays interactive. No dependencies.

items.name: bubble-vue
items.title: Bubble (Vue)
items.description: A glassy droplet that trails the cursor as blending metaballs and refracts the live page beneath it, with dispersion, frost, and an iridescent sheen. The HTML stays interactive. No dependencies.

items.name: cloth-react
items.title: Cloth (React)
items.description: Hangs your live HTML on a piece of fabric rippling in the wind, with softly lit folds. Cursor strokes send waves across the cloth. The HTML stays interactive. No dependencies.

items.title: Cloth (Vue)
items.description: Hangs your live HTML on a piece of fabric rippling in the wind, with softly lit folds. Cursor strokes send waves across the cloth. The HTML stays interactive. No dependencies.

items.name: magnify-react
items.title: Magnify (React)
items.description: A sci-fi scanner lens that follows the cursor and magnifies the live page inside a configurable HUD reticle, with chromatic aberration haze and click ripples that bend the page. The HTML stays interactive. No dependencies.

items.title: Magnify (Vue)
items.description: A sci-fi scanner lens that follows the cursor and magnifies the live page inside a configurable HUD reticle, with chromatic aberration haze and click ripples that bend the page. The HTML stays interactive. No dependencies.

items.name: glass-object-react
items.title: GlassObject (React)
items.description: Turns any GLB/glTF model, SVG, or image into a floating liquid-glass object with real refraction, chromatic dispersion, frost, and tinted absorption, lit by a studio environment. Built on three.js.

items.name: glass-object-vue
items.title: GlassObject (Vue)
items.description: Turns any GLB/glTF model, SVG, or image into a floating liquid-glass object with real refraction, chromatic dispersion, frost, and tinted absorption, lit by a studio environment. Built on three.js.

items.title: GlassObject (Svelte)
items.description: Turns any GLB/glTF model, SVG, or image into a floating liquid-glass object with real refraction, chromatic dispersion, frost, and tinted absorption, lit by a studio environment. Built on three.js.

items.name: glass-object-vanilla
